budgets.name: capability_matrix_generation
budgets.budget: 1000 iterations should remain sub-second on a GitHub ubuntu-latest runner

budgets.name: corpus_manifest_parse
budgets.budget: 200 parses should remain sub-second on a GitHub ubuntu-latest runner

budgets.name: oracle_plan_generation
budgets.budget: 1000 run-plan generations should remain sub-second on a GitHub ubuntu-latest runner

notes: These are guardrail budgets for compatibility artifact generation, not micro-benchmark guarantees.
Build context enumeration, parser-scale, and fingerprint budgets should move into dedicated benches when those workstreams are merged into this stack.
